_comment: Topic hints for daily-post.mjs. Seeded 2026-07-05 from GSC content-gap queries (real search demand where itincreditcard.com ranks pos 53-87). 'flagship' = Monday deep original-data pieces (cluster owners); 'cluster' = Wed/Fri detail posts. Rotated weekly by daily-post.mjs; existingList dedup prevents repeats. Update as GSC reveals new buried-but-real-demand queries.
flagship: The credit cards that actually accept an ITIN in 2026: a verified issuer-by-issuer list with limits, fees, and approval odds
Secured vs unsecured ITIN credit cards compared across real issuers, with deposits, APRs, and graduation timelines
Which banks and credit unions let you apply for a credit card with an ITIN (verified, with application details)

cluster: store credit cards that accept itin
